pages.title: Services
pages.body: Acme Clinic offers dental cleaning, braces consultation, emergency dental care, and whitening services.

reason: Retriever should return the tenant page that contains dental cleaning.

pages.title: Opening Hours
pages.body: Acme Clinic is open Monday to Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM and Saturday from 10 AM to 2 PM.

query: When are you open on Saturday?
reason: Retriever should find the hours page for Saturday opening time.

pages.title: Pricing
pages.body: Beta Gym memberships start at 40 dollars per month. Personal training packages are available.

reason: Retriever should find pricing content for the current tenant.

pages.title: Location
pages.body: Beta Gym is located near the central train station, next to the public library.

pages.title: Tenant One Policy
pages.body: Tenant One allows appointment cancellation up to 24 hours before the scheduled visit.

pages.title: Tenant Two Policy
pages.body: Tenant Two allows cancellation only up to 48 hours before the scheduled visit.

reason: Retriever should return only the current tenant policy, not another tenant's policy.
